description: Reconfigure nginx/acme in place — verifies the reconfigure pipeline with addon-acme. stack_name='acme' keeps the reconfigure in the baseline's stack so addon secrets stay consistent (cf. zitadel/reconf-ssl). Placeholder cert is inherited from nginx/acme, so 945 cert-issuer check may still fail (allowed2fail). Closes oci-image/acme/reconfigure gap.
